## Summary

Describe what this PR does and why. Link to the relevant issue if applicable (e.g. `Closes #42`).

## Changes

-
-

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Dependency update

## Testing

Describe how you tested this change. For code changes, include the result of a manual run:

- [ ] Ran a full collection cycle (`python collector.py`) without errors
- [ ] Verified affected CLI flags / modes still work correctly
- [ ] Updated `README.md` if behavior or config changed

## Checklist

- [ ] No hardcoded credentials, API keys, or real phishing URLs in the diff
- [ ] Log output uses `logging` (not `print`)
- [ ] No new dependencies added without updating `requirements.txt`
- [ ] Code follows the existing style
